name: How to Spot a Red Flag
original_name: How to Spot a Red Flag
overview: A spunky barista is torn between two gorgeous looking men - a confident bad boy and a charming good boy who are both involved in catfishing her. Despite noticing the red flags in the two men, is it still possible for her to find real love?

trailers.title: [TRAILER] How To Spot A Red Flag | Belle Mariano, Donny Pangilinan | Viu
[TEASER] How to Spot A Red Flag | Belle Mariano, Donny Pangilinan | Viu Philippines
